meaning: America's Carriers Telecommunications Association,美国载波通信联盟
examples: He is an associate editor for an international journal of acoustics (Acta Acustica).
The study is published in the journal Acta Paediatrica.
This emerging trend was reviewed in a paper in the journal Acta Astronautica.
The treaty, known as Acta, aims to establish international standards to enforce intellectual property rights.
Fujimori and Ecuadorian, Jamil Mahuad, signed the "Acta de Brasilia" which ended the conflict between Lima and Quito.
